title: RUSTPY-0002 — struct-sequence field getter panics with `index out of bounds` (`structseq.rs:311`)
notes: Dominant. A struct-sequence built with fewer elements than its named fields; the field getter does zelf[i] with no bounds check. CPython raises TypeError at construction. NOTE: a second construction-path face (crates/vm/src/types/structseq.rs:149, via T.__new__(T) under fusil --new-uninit) was seen 2026-07-19; not yet triaged as a distinct finding, so it is intentionally left OUT of signatures (lets a fleet resurface it as rustpyNEW).
